Title: CeBIT _ AcademiaLab

URL Source: https://academia-lab.com/encyclopedia/cebit/

Markdown Content:
[![Image 1](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1b/CeBIT_2000_exhibition_hall.jpg/220px-CeBIT_2000_exhibition_hall.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archivo:CeBIT_2000_exhibition_hall.jpg)

A sample room during CeBIT 2000.

[![Image 2](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e6/2014-03-14_CeBIT_Global_Conferences%2C_Jimmy_Wales%2C_Founder_Wikipedia%2C_%2826%29_On_stage_showing_the_world_for_Wikipedia_Zero_%28500_millions%29%2C_while_Brent_Goff_is_still_listening.jpg/220px-thumbnail.jpg)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archivo:2014-03-14_CeBIT_Global_Conferences,_Jimmy_Wales,_Founder_Wikipedia,_(26)_On_stage_showing_the_world_for_Wikipedia_Zero_(500_millions),_while_Brent_Goff_is_still_listening.jpg)

Jimmy Wales 2014 on _CeBIT Global Conferences_, Wikipedia Zero

**CeBIT** is the world's largest trade fair for computers, information technology, telecommunications, software and services. It takes place in Hanover, Germany every spring and is considered a barometer of information technology. With a sample area of 450,000 m² and 700,000 visitors it is bigger than COMDEX. The _CeBIT 2006_ exhibition, with an attendance of 450,000 people, was held from March 9 to 15, 2006. Its motto was "_Join the vision_&#3. 4;.

The name CeBIT stands for _Center for Information and Office Technology_ (_Centrum der Büro-und Informationstechnik_) and was traditionally part of the Hannover Messe, a large industrial exhibition held every year. The first trade fair was established in 1970 in the new Hall 1 on the Hanover fairground. Since information technology and telecommunications were absorbing most of the resources, it was decided in 1986 to assign it a separate exhibition calendar, held four weeks before the Hanover fair.

As CeBIT continued to grow rapidly and became too big, it was decided to target the professional market, while the home and entertainment market was given a separate event, _CeBIT home_ with a biennial calendar. However, after being held twice (in 1996 and 1998), the _CeBIT home 2000_ that was planned to take place in Leipzig was canceled and the project was abandoned.

## Transportation and access

The fairgrounds are located 8 kilometers from the center of Hannover. During the duration of CeBIT, it is possible to use the public transport of the city for free just by showing the entrance ticket to CeBIT.

## Global CeBIT Events

Since 1999 CeBIT sponsor _Deutsche Messe AG_ has organized events outside of Germany under the name CeBIT:

*   Cebit Eurasia in Istanbul
*   CeBIT Australia in Sydney
*   CeBIT Asia in Shanghai
*   CeBIT America/USA held in 2003 and 2004, but cancelled in 2005.
*   BITS Mexico(breakable link available on the Internet Archive; see history, first version and last).in Mexico City.
